title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Coinage Act, 2011. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 28th March, 2012, vide notification No. S.O. 628(E), dated 28th March, 2012, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec.. 3 (ii).
